content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於4月29日20:10進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年5月13日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 修復了部分數字存在重影的問題。
● 修復了在快速進入退出卡池時，右上角按鈕有概率消失的問題。
● 優化了啟靈回溯時，「喚醒體」還在派遣中的提示。
● 優化了英語版翻譯問題。

Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on April 29 at 20:10(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on May 13 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Fixed the issue of number ghosting. 
● Fixed the issue where the top-right button might disappear when quickly entering and exiting the card pool. 
● Optimized the notification for "Awaker" still being dispatched during Enlighten Rewind. 
● Improved translation issues in the English version.

Greetings, Keepers! 
We have seen your latest feedback on English localization, and here's where things currently stand:

**[What We've Just Fixed:]**
● Fixed numbers in some __Posse and skill descriptions__ that weren't displaying correctly (our new translation tool accidentally broke the code in places).
● Corrected formatting for the __"Cleaning Progress"__ button in the Mop & Clean event.
● Unified inconsistent terms for:
    ○ Team Unique
    ○ Psyche Surge (Personality Deepening)
    ○ Soulforge Aptitude (Soul Shaping Aptitude)
    ○ Keyflare
● We are currently aware that other battle terms such as: Strength/STR [previously Power], HP, Aliemus [sometimes mistranslated as Madness], DMG Amplification [previously Strong Attack]) are still inconsistent. We're prioritizing fixing these and will release a full __pre- and post-edit combat terms list__ for reference as soon as possible.
● __Awakener Corposant’s name__ was machine-translated into over 20 versions (including Russian... somehow). We sincerely apologize! Due to time constraints, we couldn’t manually check all new content, and the GPT translation had a stroke. We’ve applied an emergency fix to unify the names and will fully proofread the new story next update.
● Fixed __"The Timeless Call"__ event banner’s rate-up text display.
● Removed extra quotation marks around some Awakener names.
● Corrected __Awakener Murphy and Tulu’s skill names__ ("R'leyh Reversed"/"When R'leyh Returns"):
    ○ The original Chinese "螺湮" means R'leyh—the machine translation wrongly rendered it as "eddy". After reviewing feedback and consulting our writers, we’ve updated R'leyh to "Lemuria" to match Morimens' lore (Lemuria is our canon name for R'leyh). Thank you for catching this!
● Fixed "Defense" showing as "DEF" due to a tool error.

● Fixed "Recommended" button displaying as "HOT" (same tool issue).
● We are currently aware that a new string of text may show up as untranslated. We will fix the translation in a future update when the related technical issue is fully resolved.

**[Recent Hand-Edits:]**
● In this update, we manually edited PVE skill names and descriptions for:
__Corposant, Clementine, Helot: Catena, Thais, 24, Hameln, Aigis, Murphy, Ramona: Timeworn[previously Ramona-loop], Tawil, and Aurita.__
● We also adjusted Corposant’s Enlighten descriptions to match the infographic version.
We plan to tackle the Wheels of Destiny effect descriptions, PVP skill descriptions, and remaining Enlighten descriptions in future updates. 

**[Improvements We've Made:]**
● Our tool now uses unique text IDs (not original text) to prevent display errors (no more 'HOT' or 'DEF' in places where they shouldn't be... hopefully).
● We’ll share full term-change lists with each version update. Going forward, we will avoid changing names unless absolutely necessary (e.g., typos, length issues, capitalization errors, or severe mistranslations). 

**[Our Current Focus:]**
● Stabilizing tools/code for smoother localization updates.
● Cleaning up main UI text and standardizing combat terms.

**[What We're Still Working On:]**
● Some __skill names, effect names, and attribute names__ are still inconsistent. We’re fixing these in future updates. Thanks for your patience, Keepers!
● __Corposant’s new story__ is still machine translated this time. We plan to bring you human-proofread new story content in the next update!
● Standardizing all *Awakeners’ PVE skill descriptions* soon.

**[To Our Volunteer Proofreaders:]**
A huge thank you to everyone who volunteered! We’ve saved your info but are waiting until tools are stable before reaching out, since we don’t want your hard work lost due to technical issues. We’ll contact you once everything’s ready!If you notice anything off with the translations, feel free to drop us a note in thehttps://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1350058928020656178!
